mapper.sql: user_id, moves_json, replay_step, board_json, side_to_move, source_game_id, black_piece_skin_id, white_piece_skin_id, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_replay_study WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_replay_study ( user_id, moves_json, replay_step, board_json, side_to_move, source_game_id, black_piece_skin_id, white_piece_skin_id ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{movesJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{replayStep}, #{boardJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{sideToMove}, #{sourceGameId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{blackPieceSkinId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{whitePieceSkinId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE moves_json = VALUES(moves_json), replay_step = VALUES(replay_step), board_json = VALUES(board_json), side_to_move = VALUES(side_to_move), source_game_id = VALUES(source_game_id), black_piece_skin_id = VALUES(black_piece_skin_id), white_piece_skin_id = VALUES(white_piece_skin_id)
